recommendations.title: Human Capital
recommendations.overview: The destinies of two families are irrevocably tied together after a cyclist is hit off the road by a jeep in the night before Christmas Eve.

recommendations.title: Ovosodo
recommendations.overview: From childhood to fatherhood, Piero learns things the hard way while growing up in a working-class neighborhood of Livorno.

recommendations.title: Like Crazy
recommendations.overview: Two mental patients with opposite personalities ditch their Tuscan hospital and embark on an unpredictable exploration of the real world.

recommendations.title: Every Blessed Day
recommendations.overview: Guido and Antonia are a young couple with opposed characters and backgrounds. He works a night job as a doorman, while she works all day in a car rental service. This is the story of what happens when they decide to have a child.

recommendations.title: Caterina in the Big City
recommendations.overview: When her social-climbing father is relocated from a one-horse town to his native Rome, 12-year-old Caterina enrolls in his old school, finding herself adrift in an environment where eighth-graders form friendships based on social class and their pare

recommendations.title: The Leisure Seeker
recommendations.overview: A runaway couple go on an unforgettable journey from Boston to Key West, recapturing their passion for life and their love for each other on a road trip that provides revelation and surprise right up to the very end.

recommendations.title: Magical Nights
recommendations.overview: Rome, 1990. The night Italy's national football team is eliminated from the World Cup by Argentina on penalty kicks, a well-known film producer is found dead in the Tiber river. The main suspects for the murder are three young aspiring screenwriters,

recommendations.title: August Vacation

recommendations.title: A Whole Life Ahead

recommendations.title: The First Beautiful Thing
